YOKA-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.title: Temporary Thorns
YOKA-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back this turn.
YOKA-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.smartDescrip: When hit by an attack, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage back this turn.
YOKA-VAKUU_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Vakuu Next Turn
YOKA-VAKUU_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: Vakuu will play the next turn for you.
YOKA-VAKUU_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDescript: Vakuu will play the next turn for you.
YOKA-PROTOTYPE_POWER.title: Prototype
YOKA-PROTOTYPE_POWER.description: Whenever you gain or inflict a buff or debuff, gain [gold]Temporary Thorns[/gold].
YOKA-PROTOTYPE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain or inflict a buff or debuff, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Temporary Thorns[/gold].
YOKA-TEMPORARY_THORNS_NEXT_TURN_POWER.de: Next turn, when hit by an attack, deal damage back.
YOKA-TEMPORARY_THORNS_NEXT_TURN_POWER.sm: Next turn, when hit by an attack, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage back.
YOKA-HYSTERIA_POWER.title: Hysteria
YOKA-HYSTERIA_POWER.description:
At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Energy[/gold].
Whenever you play a card, add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
YOKA-HYSTERIA_POWER.smartDescription:
At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
Whenever you play a card, add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
YOKA-DEATH_WISH_POWER.title: Death Wish
YOKA-DEATH_WISH_POWER.description: Whenever you lose Max HP, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
YOKA-DEATH_WISH_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you lose Max HP, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
YOKA-HIGH_ROLLER_POWER.title: High Roller
YOKA-HIGH_ROLLER_POWER.description: Whenever you gain or lose Gold, gain [gold]Strength[/gold].
YOKA-HIGH_ROLLER_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain or lose Gold, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
YOKA-ENCIRCLE_POWER.title: Encircle
YOKA-ACCIDENT_POWER.title: Accident
YOKA-ACCIDENT_POWER.description: Whenever you gain or lose [gold]Gold[/gold], a random enemy takes damage.
YOKA-ACCIDENT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain or lose [gold]Gold[/gold], a random enemy takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
YOKA-SYMBIOSIS_POWER.title: Symbiosis
YOKA-SYMBIOSIS_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Thorns[/gold].
YOKA-SYMBIOSIS_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/gold] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
YOKA-IMMUNIZE_POWER.title: Immunize
YOKA-IMMUNIZE_POWER.description: Whenever you receive unblocked attack damage, other players heal.
YOKA-IMMUNIZE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you receive unblocked attack damage, other players heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
YOKA-RAZOR_FORM_POWER.title: Razor Form
YOKA-EMBARASS.title: Embarass
YOKA-ATTUNE_POWER.title: Attune
YOKA-ATTUNE_POWER.description: Next turn, put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
YOKA-ATTUNE_POWER.smartDescription: Next turn, put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
YOKA-ATTUNE_POWER.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to put in your Hand.
